zh.lifeSummary: 當Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy於1226年出生在英國威爾斯安格萊利朗德時，他的父親Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED31歲，母親Morfydd ferch Meurig27歲。他和Catrin ferch Madog至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1297年在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根希萊享年71歲，埋葬在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy于1226年出生在英国威尔斯安格萊利朗德时，他的父亲Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED31岁，母亲Morfydd ferch Meurig27岁。他和Catrin ferch Madog至少有6个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1297年在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根希萊享年71岁，埋葬在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Gronwy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gronow
meanings: Welsh: relationship name from the Welsh personal name Goronwy (also found as Gronw and Gronow, from Old Welsh Guorgonui).

nameMeanings.name: Gronwy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name of uncertain derivation, borne in the Mabinogi by Goronwy the Staunch , Lord of Penllyn. He became the lover of the flower-maiden Blodeuedd and murdered her husband Lleu Llaw Gyffes , but Lleu was later restored to life and definitively dispatched Goronwy.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

en.lifeSummary: When Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy was born in 1226, in Llangoed, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED, was 31 and his mother, Morfydd ferch Meurig, was 27. He had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Catrin ferch Madog. He died in 1297, in Cibwr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales.

fr.Trecastell, Llangoed, Anglesey, Wales: Llangoed, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.Cibwr, Senghennydd, Glamorganshire, Wale: Cibwr, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy est né en 1226, à Llangoed, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Morfydd ferch Meurig, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Catrin ferch Madog. Il est décédé en 1297, à Cibwr, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy 1226 in Llangoed, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED 31 und seine Mutter Morfydd ferch Meurig 27. Er hatte mit Catrin ferch Madog mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1297 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Cibwr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy è nato il nel 1226 nel Llangoed, Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Morfydd ferch Meurig, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Catrin ferch Madog. Morì nel 1297, nel Cibwr, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwyが1226年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイランゴエドで生まれた時，父Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFEDは31歳，母Morfydd ferch Meurigは27歳であった。彼はCatrin ferch Madogとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1297年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンシブウルで71歳で死去し，ウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアモントゴメリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy(이)가 1226년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시 랭드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Morfydd ferch Meurig(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Catrin ferch Madog(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1297년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 시브르에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 몽고머이실르 몽고메리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy nasceu em 1226, em Llangoed, Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Morfydd ferch Meurig, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Catrin ferch Madog. Ele faleceu em 1297, em Cibwr, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy родился в 1226 г. в местности ллангоед, англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Morfydd ferch Meurig, 27. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Catrin ferch Madog. Он умер в 1297 г. в местности сибр, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности монтгомири, монтгомиришир, Уэльс.

es.Trecastell, Llangoed, Anglesey, Wales: Llangoed, Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy nació en 1226, en Llangoed, Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Morfydd ferch Meurig, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas con Catrin ferch Madog. Murió en 1297, en Cibwr, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales.
